items.title: Critically appraised papers: Adding physiotherapy or motivational text messages does not improve pain beyond home exercise alone for degenerative meniscal tear and knee pain [commentary].
items.summary: 一项评论文章指出，对于退行性半月板撕裂和膝关节疼痛，在家庭运动方案基础上增加物理治疗或励志短信并不能进一步改善疼痛。
items.curatedReason: 运动疗法对退行性半月板撕裂和膝关节疼痛的疗效似乎没有额外获益。提醒你，辅助治疗不应替代核心运动方案。
items.titleZh: 评论：对退行性半月板撕裂和膝关节疼痛，物理治疗或励志短信未比单独家庭运动带来额外疼痛改善
items.summaryZh: 一篇评论文章认为，对于退行性半月板撕裂和膝关节疼痛，在家庭运动基础上增加物理治疗或励志短信，并不能进一步改善疼痛。
items.curatedReasonEn: Exercise therapy for degenerative meniscal tears and knee pain does not appear to offer additional benefits beyond home exercise alone. This reminds you that adjunctive treatments should not replace core exercise programs.
items.limitation: 这是一篇评论，不是原始研究，证据等级不高。
items.limitationEn: This is a commentary, not an original research study, so the evidence level is not high.

items.title: Critically appraised paper: Mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation improved exercise capacity as much as and health status more than centre-based pulmonary rehabilitation for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease [synopsis].
items.summary: 一篇综述性评论指出，基于移动设备的肺康复对慢性阻塞性肺病（COPD）患者在运动能力方面的改善效果与中心康复相当，且对健康状况的改善更优。
items.curatedReason: 远程肺康复能与中心康复疗效相当，甚至在健康状况方面更优。这意味着可以考虑远程方案，提升COPD患者可及性与依从性，扩展服务半径。
items.titleZh: 评论：移动肺康复在运动能力方面与中心康复疗效相当，且在健康状况方面更优
items.summaryZh: 一篇综述性评论指出，对于COPD患者，移动肺康复在运动能力改善上与中心康复相当，但在健康状况改善上更优。
items.curatedReasonEn: Remote pulmonary rehabilitation is comparable to center-based rehabilitation, and may even be superior in terms of health status. This means you can consider remote options to improve accessibility and adherence for COPD patients, expanding your service reach.
items.limitation: 这是一篇评论性综述，不是原始研究。
items.limitationEn: This is a synoptic commentary, not original research.

items.title: Effects of electrical stimulation on lower limb function after anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction: a systematic review and network meta-analysis | BMC Musculoskeletal Disorders | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: 一项系统综述和网络 Meta 分析比较了不同电刺激模式结合康复训练对 ACL 重建术后患者下肢功能改善的治疗效果。
items.curatedReason: 对于 ACL 重建术后患者，电刺激结合康复训练能显著改善下肢功能。这份网络 Meta 分析为你提供了不同电刺激模式的比较，指导你优化康复方案。
items.titleZh: 电刺激对ACL重建术后下肢功能影响的系统综述和网络Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和网络 Meta 分析比较了不同电刺激模式联合康复训练对 ACL 重建术后患者下肢功能改善的疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: For patients post-ACL reconstruction, electrical stimulation combined with rehabilitation training significantly improves lower limb function. This network meta-analysis provides a comparison of different electrical stimulation modalities, guiding you to optimize rehabilitation protocols.
items.limitation: 网络 Meta 分析中的间接比较可能存在局限性，需注意异质性。
items.limitationEn: Indirect comparisons in network meta-analysis may have limitations, and heterogeneity needs to be considered.

items.title: Six-session non-operative exercise program yields sustained benefits for up to 18 months in end-stage knee osteoarthritis: a retrospective cohort study - Clinical Rheumatology
items.summary: 一项回顾性队列研究显示，针对等待全膝关节置换的终末期膝关节骨关节炎患者，为期六次的非手术运动方案可带来长达18个月的持续益处。
items.curatedReason: 针对等待全膝关节置换的终末期膝关节骨关节炎患者，六次非手术运动方案可带来长达 18 个月的持续益处。这给你与患者和骨科医生讨论保守治疗提供了有力证据。
items.titleZh: 六次非手术运动方案为终末期膝骨关节炎带来长达18个月的持续益处：回顾性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究表明，针对等待全膝关节置换的终末期膝关节骨关节炎患者，为期六次的非手术运动方案能提供长达18个月的持续益处。
items.curatedReasonEn: A six-session non-operative exercise program yields sustained benefits for up to 18 months in end-stage knee osteoarthritis patients awaiting TKR. This provides strong evidence for you to discuss conservative treatment with patients and orthopedic surgeons.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性队列研究，存在潜在的选择偏倚和混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective cohort study, subject to potential selection bias and confounding factors.

items.curatedReason: 这项带有纵向和多变量Meta分析的系统综述深入分析了ACL重建术后股四头肌和腘绳肌力量的变化。这为你提供了评估术后恢复和制定力量训练计划的关键证据。

items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review with longitudinal and multivariate meta-analysis deeply analyzes changes in quadriceps and hamstring muscle strength after ACL reconstruction. This provides you with critical evidence for evaluating postoperative recovery and developing strength training plans.
items.limitation: Meta分析的异质性可能影响结果的普遍适用性。
items.limitationEn: Heterogeneity in meta-analysis may affect the general applicability of the results.

items.summaryZh: 德国更新了神经源性下尿路功能障碍患者间歇性导尿管理和实施的临床实践指南（3.0版）。
items.curatedReasonEn: Germany has updated its clinical practice guideline for intermittent catheterization in neurogenic lower urinary tract dysfunction, focusing on management and implementation. If you serve neurological patients, especially those from Germany or practicing in similar regulatory environments, this guideline is an essential reference.

items.title: Fusogenic therapy restored spinal cord function after complete transection - Spinal Surgery News
items.summary: 一个国际研究团队通过融合疗法和综合康复，在动物模型中成功恢复了脊髓完全横断后的运动、感觉和盆腔功能，该研究成果已发表在《PLOS One》杂志。
items.curatedReason: 国际团队在动物模型中通过融合疗法和综合康复，成功恢复了脊髓完全横断后的运动、感觉和盆腔功能。这预示着脊髓损伤的康复突破，虽然仍处于动物实验阶段，但值得密切关注。
items.titleZh: 融合疗法恢复了脊髓完全横断后的功能
items.summaryZh: 国际团队在动物模型中利用融合疗法和综合康复，成功恢复了脊髓完全横断后的运动、感觉和盆腔功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: An international team has successfully restored motor, sensory, and pelvic functions after complete spinal cord transection in animal models, using fusogenic therapy combined with comprehensive rehabilitation. This heralds a breakthrough in spinal cord injury rehabilitation; though still in animal trials, it warrants close attention.
items.limitation: 这是一项动物模型研究，结果能否转化到人体尚不确定。
items.limitationEn: This is an animal model study, and it is uncertain whether the results can be translated to humans.

items.title: Mindset, Effort, and Support-the foundation for patients' decision to return to sport after an anterior cruciate ligament injury. A qualitative analysis from the NACOX Cohort.
items.summary: 一项定性分析发现，275名ACL损伤患者中，决定重返运动的关键因素包括“动机与驱动力”、“治疗与康复”以及“医学许可与准备度”三大类。
items.curatedReason: 患者决定 ACL 损伤后重返运动的关键因素是心理状态、努力程度和支持。评估和干预时，不只看生理指标，还要纳入这些主观要素。
items.titleZh: 心态、努力与支持——ACL损伤患者重返运动决策的基础：NACOX队列定性分析
items.summaryZh: 一项对275名ACL损伤患者的定性分析显示，患者决定重返运动的关键因素可归纳为“动机与驱动力”、“治疗与康复”及“医学许可与准备度”三类。
items.curatedReasonEn: Patients' decision to return to sport after ACL injury hinges on mindset, effort, and support. When assessing and intervening, incorporate these subjective factors beyond just physiological metrics.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性分析，无法提供量化效应或因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This study is a qualitative analysis and cannot provide quantitative effects or causal relationships.
items.journal: Physical therapy in sport : official journal of the Association of Chartered Physiotherapists in Sports Medicine

items.title: Acupuncture for postoperative rehabilitation in degenerative lumbar spinal diseases: mechanisms and clinical evidence | European Spine Journal | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: 一篇综述探讨了针灸在退行性腰椎疾病术后康复中的机制和临床证据。
items.curatedReason: 对于退行性腰椎疾病术后康复，针灸的作用机制和临床证据正被系统性回顾。这提示你可以关注其作为辅助治疗的潜力，但尚需高水平证据支持。
items.titleZh: 针灸在退行性腰椎疾病术后康复中的机制与临床证据
items.summaryZh: 一篇综述探讨了针灸在退行性腰椎疾病术后康复中的作用机制和临床证据。
items.curatedReasonEn: Acupuncture's mechanisms and clinical evidence for postoperative rehabilitation in degenerative lumbar spinal diseases are being systematically reviewed. This suggests you can explore its potential as an adjunctive therapy, but higher-level evidence is still needed.
items.limitation: 这是一篇综述，而非原始研究，证据强度有局限性。
items.limitationEn: This is a review, not an original study, so the evidence strength is limited.

items.title: Urogenital Hiatus Closure System: A Framework for Understanding how Muscle, Motor Control, and Fascial Connections Interact in Normal and Failed Closure
items.summary: 一项研究提出了泌尿生殖道裂孔闭合系统框架，以理解肌肉、运动控制和筋膜连接在正常和功能失调闭合中的相互作用。
items.curatedReason: 这份关于泌尿生殖道裂孔闭合系统的框架性研究，有助于你更深入地理解盆底功能障碍的肌肉、运动控制和筋膜连接的相互作用。在评估盆底功能时，应综合考虑这些因素。
items.titleZh: 泌尿生殖道裂孔闭合系统：理解肌肉、运动控制与筋膜连接在正常和失效闭合中相互作用的框架
items.summaryZh: 一项研究提出了泌尿生殖道裂孔闭合系统框架，以帮助理解肌肉、运动控制和筋膜连接在正常及功能失调闭合中的相互作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This framework study on the urogenital hiatus closure system helps you gain a deeper understanding of the interaction between muscles, motor control, and fascial connections in pelvic floor dysfunction. When assessing pelvic floor function, these factors should be considered comprehensively.
items.limitation: 这是一项框架性研究，并非干预性试验，没有具体治疗效果数据。
items.limitationEn: This is a framework study, not an interventional trial, so there is no specific treatment outcome data.

items.title: Functional Status after Ventral Hernia Repair: Longitudinal Trends and the Limits of Improvement
items.summary: 一项前瞻性试点研究（NCT05142618）分析了腹壁疝修复术后患者的功能状态，通过定时起立行走（TUG）和五次坐站（5xSTS）测试评估，发现功能评分随时间改善，但存在改善的局限性。
items.curatedReason: 腹壁疝修复术后的功能状态在术后会随时间改善，但存在改善的局限性。这提示你在术后康复中，应现实地设定患者功能恢复目标，并关注长期功能维持。
items.titleZh: 腹壁疝修复术后的功能状态：纵向趋势与改善的局限性
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性研究评估了腹壁疝修复术后功能状态，发现TUG和5xSTS测试评分随时间改善，但存在改善局限性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Functional status after ventral hernia repair improves over time post-surgery, but with limitations. This suggests you should set realistic functional recovery goals for patients during postoperative rehabilitation and focus on long-term functional maintenance.
items.limitation: 这是一项试点研究，样本量和随访时间有限，长期结果需进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: This is a pilot study with limited sample size and follow-up duration; long-term results require further validation.

items.title: Remotely delivered resistance training program in adult sarcoma survivors: a pilot study | BMC Cancer | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: 一项单臂、前瞻性试点研究评估了远程交付的监督性渐进式阻力训练计划在成人肉瘤幸存者中改善身体功能的可行性。
items.curatedReason: 远程监督阻力训练对成人肉瘤幸存者具有可行性，并有望改善其身体功能。这意味着你可以考虑将远程康复模式应用于这类特殊人群，提高治疗可及性。
items.titleZh: 远程递送阻力训练项目对成人肉瘤幸存者的试点研究
items.summaryZh: 一项单臂、前瞻性试点研究评估了远程监督阻力训练计划对成人肉瘤幸存者身体功能改善的可行性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Remotely supervised resistance training is feasible for adult sarcoma survivors and shows promise in improving physical functioning. This means you can consider applying remote rehabilitation models to this special population to improve treatment accessibility.
items.limitation: 这是一项单臂、前瞻性研究，缺乏对照组，无法排除安慰剂效应。
items.limitationEn: This is a single-arm, pre-post study lacking a control group, thus unable to rule out placebo effects.

items.title: Transcutaneous spinal stimulation with upper extremity robotic training in chronic stroke and spinal cord injury: individual neurophysiological and clinical responses | Journal of NeuroEngineering and Rehabilitation | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: 一项研究探讨了经皮脊髓电刺激结合上肢机器人训练在慢性卒中和脊髓损伤患者中的个体神经生理和临床反应。
items.curatedReason: 此研究结合了经皮脊髓电刺激与上肢机器人训练，提示了慢性卒中和脊髓损伤患者个体化神经生理和临床反应的潜力。这为你在神经康复中整合先进技术提供了思路。
items.titleZh: 经皮脊髓电刺激结合上肢机器人训练在慢性卒中和脊髓损伤中的个体神经生理和临床反应
items.summaryZh: 一项研究探讨了经皮脊髓电刺激与上肢机器人训练在慢性卒中和脊髓损伤患者中引发的个体神经生理和临床反应。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study, combining transcutaneous spinal stimulation with upper extremity robotic training, highlights the potential for individualized neurophysiological and clinical responses in chronic stroke and spinal cord injury patients. This provides insight into integrating advanced technologies into your neurorehabilitation practice.
items.limitation: 研究关注个体化反应，可能样本量较小，结果外推性需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study focuses on individualized responses, potentially involving a small sample size, so the generalizability of the results should be considered cautiously.

items.title: Personalizing post-stroke symptom management: integrating network analysis and in silico intervention to identify subgroup-specific targets | BMC Neurology | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: 一项研究整合了网络分析和体内干预，旨在识别亚组特异性靶点，以实现卒中后症状的个性化管理。
items.curatedReason: 利用网络分析和体内干预个性化卒中后症状管理，识别亚组特异性靶点。这意味着你可以根据患者的症状交互模式，更精准地制定个体化康复方案，提升疗效。
items.titleZh: 个性化卒中后症状管理：整合网络分析和体内干预以识别亚组特异性靶点
items.summaryZh: 一项研究结合网络分析与体内干预，旨在通过识别亚组特异性靶点来个性化卒中后症状管理。
items.curatedReasonEn: Personalizing post-stroke symptom management using network analysis and in silico interventions to identify subgroup-specific targets. This means you can tailor individualized rehabilitation plans more precisely based on patients' symptom interaction patterns, improving treatment effectiveness.
items.limitation: 这项研究是利用网络分析和体内干预的计算模型，尚未经过大规模临床验证。
items.limitationEn: This study uses computational models from network analysis and in silico interventions, which have not yet undergone large-scale clinical validation.

items.title: Rehabilitation technologies perceived positively by patients and facilitated intensive therapy within sessions
items.summary: 一项多方法研究发现，澳大利亚住院康复机构的患者普遍对康复技术持积极态度，且这些技术有助于在治疗会话中促进高强度治疗。
items.curatedReason: 患者普遍对康复技术持积极态度，且这些技术能促进会话内的高强度治疗。这意味着你可以放心地将这些康复技术整合到日常实践中，以提高治疗效果和患者参与度。
items.titleZh: 患者积极看待康复技术，并有助于促进会话内高强度治疗
items.summaryZh: 一项研究显示，患者普遍对康复技术持积极态度，且这些技术有助于在治疗会话中促进高强度治疗。
items.curatedReasonEn: Patients generally have a positive attitude towards rehabilitation technologies, and these technologies can facilitate intensive therapy within sessions. This means you can confidently integrate these rehabilitation technologies into your daily practice to improve treatment outcomes and patient engagement.
items.limitation: 这是一项多方法研究，定性部分可能受访者偏倚影响。
items.limitationEn: This is a mixed-methods study, and the qualitative portion may be affected by respondent bias.

items.title: Directional Symptom Dependencies in Multiple Sclerosis and Parkinson's Disease: A Comparative Bayesian Network Analysis
items.summary: 一项比较性贝叶斯网络分析揭示了多发性硬化症和帕金森病症状之间的方向性依赖关系。
items.curatedReason: 比较性贝叶斯网络分析揭示了多发性硬化症和帕金森病症状之间的方向性依赖关系。这为你理解两种疾病的症状复杂性提供了新视角，有助于更精准地设计个体化干预。
items.titleZh: 多发性硬化症和帕金森病的症状方向性依赖性：比较性贝叶斯网络分析
items.summaryZh: 一项比较性贝叶斯网络分析揭示了多发性硬化症与帕金森病症状间的方向性依赖关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: Comparative Bayesian network analysis reveals directional symptom dependencies in Multiple Sclerosis and Parkinson's Disease. This provides a new perspective for you to understand the symptom complexity of both diseases, aiding in more precise individualized intervention design.
items.limitation: 贝叶斯网络分析是统计模型，其因果推断可能受数据质量和模型假设限制。
items.limitationEn: Bayesian network analysis is a statistical model, and its causal inferences may be limited by data quality and model assumptions.

items.title: Rehabilitation of Long-Standing Groin Pain in Athletes: A Scoping Review of Exercise Content and Reporting | Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy
items.summary: 一篇范围性综述对运动员慢性腹股沟疼痛的康复、运动内容和报告进行了审查。
items.curatedReason: 运动员慢性腹股沟疼痛康复的范围审查提供了运动内容和报告的概览。这帮助你了解当前康复策略的广度和局限性，指导你为运动员制定更全面的治疗计划。
items.titleZh: 运动员慢性腹股沟疼痛康复：运动内容与报告的范围审查
items.summaryZh: 一篇范围性综述审查了运动员慢性腹股沟疼痛的康复、运动内容和报告情况。
items.curatedReasonEn: A scoping review of rehabilitation for long-standing groin pain in athletes provides an overview of exercise content and reporting. This helps you understand the breadth and limitations of current rehabilitation strategies, guiding you in developing more comprehensive treatment plans for athletes.
items.limitation: 这是一篇范围性综述，主要侧重于文献的概览，不提供具体的治疗效果或推荐等级。
items.limitationEn: This is a scoping review, primarily focusing on an overview of the literature, and does not provide specific treatment effects or recommendation grades.

items.title: Apraxia in Patients with Cognitive Impairment: Evidence from Familiar Tool Use
items.summary: 一项研究指出，随着人口老龄化加速，认知障碍患者的失用症呈现高流行率，严重影响其维持基本日常生活活动的能力，加重照护负担。
items.curatedReason: 认知障碍患者的失用症影响其基本日常生活活动能力。早期识别并介入熟练工具使用等功能任务，可能是改善生活质量和减轻照护负担的有效途径。
items.titleZh: 认知障碍患者的失用症：来自熟练工具使用的证据
items.summaryZh: 一项研究表明，认知障碍患者中失用症高发，显著损害其基本日常生活活动能力，并增加照护负担。
items.curatedReasonEn: Apraxia in cognitively impaired patients affects their ability to perform basic daily activities. Early identification and intervention with functional tasks like familiar tool use may be an effective way to improve quality of life and reduce caregiver burden.
items.limitation: 摘要未提供研究设计细节，无法评估其证据等级和局限性。
items.limitationEn: The abstract does not provide details of the study design, so the evidence level and limitations cannot be assessed.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Can the Effects of Exercise Therapy on Achilles Tendinopathy Be Enhanced by Adding Nutritional Advice-A Randomized Controlled Pilot Study
items.summary: 一项随机对照试点研究旨在探讨营养建议是否能增强运动疗法对跟腱病的疗效。
items.curatedReason: 此试点研究提示营养建议可能与运动疗法对跟腱病有协同作用。但结果尚属初步，不要作为常规推荐，等待更大规模研究确认。
items.titleZh: 营养建议能否增强运动疗法对跟腱病疗效的随机对照试点研究
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试点研究正在探究营养建议能否提升运动疗法对跟腱病的治疗效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This pilot study suggests that nutritional advice might synergize with exercise therapy for Achilles tendinopathy. However, the results are preliminary; do not make it a routine recommendation. Await confirmation from larger-scale studies.
items.limitation: 这是一项随机对照的试点研究，样本量和外推性可能有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a randomized controlled pilot study, so sample size and generalizability may be limited.

items.title: Effect of 12-week dynamic stretching of hamstrings on joint flexibility and musculoskeletal properties | European Journal of Applied Physiology | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: 一项研究旨在评估为期12周的腘绳肌动态拉伸计划对关节柔韧性、肌肉力量和肌肉骨骼特性的影响，并与非拉伸肢体进行比较。
items.curatedReason: 12周的襻绳肌动态拉伸可改善关节柔韧性和肌肉骨骼特性。这支持你将动态拉伸纳入襻绳肌柔韧性改善的训练计划中。
items.titleZh: 12周腘绳肌动态拉伸对关节柔韧性和肌肉骨骼特性的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项研究旨在评估12周腘绳肌动态拉伸计划对关节柔韧性、肌肉力量及肌肉骨骼特性的影响，并与未拉伸肢体进行比较。
items.curatedReasonEn: A 12-week dynamic hamstring stretching program can improve joint flexibility and musculoskeletal properties. This supports incorporating dynamic stretching into your hamstring flexibility training programs.
items.limitation: 该研究缺乏对照组，无法排除其他因素的影响。
items.limitationEn: This study lacks a control group, making it impossible to rule out the influence of other factors.

items.title: BMJ Rapid Recommendations
items.summary: 《英国医学杂志》(BMJ) 正与 MAGIC 合作推出“快速推荐”项目，旨在加速研究证据转化为临床实践，通过可信赖的推荐快速透明地回答重要问题。
items.curatedReason: 《英国医学杂志》的快速推荐旨在加速研究证据转化为临床实践。这是一个有用的资源，为你提供了及时、值得信赖的最新临床指南。
items.titleZh: 《英国医学杂志》快速推荐：加速证据转化实践
items.summaryZh: 《英国医学杂志》与 MAGIC 合作推出“快速推荐”项目，旨在通过可信赖的推荐，加速研究证据向临床实践的转化。
items.curatedReasonEn: BMJ Rapid Recommendations aim to accelerate the translation of research evidence into clinical practice. This is a useful resource for timely, trustworthy, and up-to-date clinical guidelines.

items.title: Extrapedicular approach for basivertebral nerve radiofrequency ablation: a conceptual review | Journal of Orthopaedic Surgery and Research | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: 一篇概念性综述综合分析了椎基底神经射频消融术椎弓根外入路的解剖学、生物力学和安全性考量，该技术被日益认为是治疗椎体源性慢性轴性腰痛的有效方法。
items.curatedReason: 椎基底神经射频消融术的椎弓根外入路是一种新兴的治疗 vertebrogenic 腰痛的方法。了解其解剖学和生物力学考虑，有助于你为患者提供更全面的咨询。
items.titleZh: 椎基底神经射频消融术的椎弓根外入路：概念性综述
items.summaryZh: 一篇概念性综述分析了椎基底神经射频消融术椎弓根外入路的解剖、生物力学和安全考量，该技术被认为是治疗椎体源性慢性轴性腰痛的有效方法。
items.curatedReasonEn: The extrapedicular approach for basivertebral nerve radiofrequency ablation is an emerging treatment for vertebrogenic low back pain. Understanding its anatomical and biomechanical considerations will help you provide more comprehensive consultations to patients.
items.limitation: 这是一篇概念性综述，缺乏原创临床数据。
items.limitationEn: This is a conceptual review, lacking original clinical data.

items.title: Histological study to assess CO2 laser therapy for the treatment of vaginal atrophy - ScienceDirect
items.summary: 一项组织学研究评估了CO2激光疗法对阴道萎缩的治疗效果。研究发现，阴道激光治疗可改善阴道萎缩症状，但组织学上未见显著改变。
items.curatedReason: CO2激光疗法在改善阴道萎缩症状方面表现出积极效果，但组织学上未见显著改变。这意味着症状改善可能不完全通过结构性变化，你需要将其告知患者，并评估结合物理治疗的可能性。
items.titleZh: 评估CO2激光疗法治疗阴道萎缩的组织学研究
items.summaryZh: 一项组织学研究评估CO2激光疗法治疗阴道萎缩的有效性，发现症状有所改善但组织学无显著变化。
items.curatedReasonEn: CO2 laser therapy shows positive effects in improving symptoms of vaginal atrophy, but without significant histological changes. This means symptom improvement may not be solely through structural changes; you need to inform patients and evaluate the possibility of combining it with physical therapy.
items.limitation: 本研究为组织学研究，未能提供功能性康复结局的全面评估。
items.limitationEn: This is a histological study and does not provide a comprehensive evaluation of functional rehabilitation outcomes.

items.title: ChainBMD: A deep learning framework for stroke evaluation and guidance using kinetic chain graphs and temporal analysis - ScienceDirect

items.titleZh: ChainBMD：基于运动链图和时间分析的卒中评估与指导深度学习框架

This means you can focus on the potential of AI in assisting stroke rehabilitation assessment and training guidance, improving efficiency and objectivity.

items.title: Branched-chain amino acids alleviate Parkinson’s neurodegeneration via microbial propionate-dependent restoration of the PI3K/Akt/mTORC1 axis - ScienceDirect
items.summary: 一项研究发现，支链氨基酸通过微生物丙酸依赖性恢复PI3K/Akt/mTORC1轴，从而减轻帕金森神经退行性变。
items.curatedReason: 支链氨基酸通过肠道丙酸依赖性恢复PI3K/Akt/mTORC1轴来减轻帕金森神经退行性变。这提示了营养干预在帕金森病管理中的潜在作用，你可以关注肠道-脑轴对康复的影响。
items.titleZh: 支链氨基酸通过微生物丙酸依赖性恢复PI3K/Akt/mTORC1轴减轻帕金森神经退行性变
items.summaryZh: 一项研究发现，支链氨基酸通过微生物丙酸依赖性恢复PI3K/Akt/mTORC1轴，可减轻帕金森神经退行性变。
items.curatedReasonEn: Branched-chain amino acids alleviate Parkinson's neurodegeneration by microbial propionate-dependent restoration of the PI3K/Akt/mTORC1 axis. items.title: [Relationship between the consistency of auxiliary provocation tests with the supine roll test and treatment outcomes for horizontal semicircular canal benign paroxysmal positional vertigo]

items.curatedReason: 辅助诱发试验与仰卧滚转试验的一致性可能与水平半规管BPPV的治疗效果相关。这意味着在诊断和治疗这类眩晕时，评估试验的一致性可能是指导治疗和预判疗效的重要指标。
items.titleZh: 辅助诱发试验与仰卧滚转试验一致性与水平半规管BPPV治疗结局的关系

items.curatedReasonEn: The consistency between auxiliary provocation tests and the supine roll test may be related to the treatment outcomes for horizontal semicircular canal BPPV. This means that when diagnosing and treating this type of vertigo, assessing test consistency could be an important indicator for guiding treatment and predicting efficacy.

items.titleZh: IL-17A调节星形胶质细胞活性与电针改善卒中后感觉运动能力相关
items.summaryZh: 一项研究发现，IL-17A调节的星形胶质细胞活性与电针改善卒中后感觉运动能力相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: IL-17A modulating astrocytic activity is associated with electroacupuncture-mediated improvement of sensorimotor ability after stroke. items.title: Hip Muscle Strength Is Associated With Symptom Severity in People With Femoroacetabular Impingement Syndrome, but Only in Those With Preexisting Hip Muscle Weakness: A Secondary Analysis of Baseline Data From a Randomized Controlled Trial
items.summary: A secondary analysis of an RCT baseline data found that hip muscle strength is associated with symptom severity in FAI Syndrome patients, but only in those with preexisting hip muscle weakness.
items.curatedReason: 对于 FAI 综合征患者，髋关节肌力与症状严重程度的关联仅在已存在髋肌无力的人群中更明显。这意味着在评估时应更关注基线肌力较弱的患者。
items.titleZh: 髋关节肌力与股骨髋臼撞击综合征患者症状严重程度相关，但仅限于髋肌无力者：一项随机对照试验基线数据的二次分析

items.curatedReasonEn: For FAI syndrome patients, hip muscle strength is associated with symptom severity primarily in those with preexisting hip muscle weakness. This means you should pay more attention to patients with weaker baseline muscle strength during assessment.
items.limitation: 作为随机对照试验的二次分析，其结果受限于原始研究的设计和数据，可能存在未报告的混杂因素。

items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study of 85 women with obesity suggests that assessing functional capacity, musculoskeletal symptoms, and perceived barriers helps to comprehensively understand reasons for low physical activity and guide personalized interventions.
items.limitation: 研究设计为横断面，无法确立因果关系；样本量较小（n=85）。
items.limitationEn: The cross-sectional design prevents causal inference, and the sample size is relatively small (n=85).
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Stroke-specific Movement Patterns During Passage Through a Narrow-Opening: A Cross-Sectional Study.
items.summary: This cross-sectional study classified movement patterns of 23 individuals with stroke passing through narrow openings, identifying stroke-specific patterns distinct from age-matched controls, which involved difficulty rotating the trunk and adjusting the supporting foot.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究分类了卒中患者通过狭窄开口时的特定运动模式，有助于临床医师更精细地评估患者的功能受限，并针对性地进行步态和平衡训练。
items.titleZh: 卒中患者通过狭窄开口时的特定运动模式：一项横断面研究。
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面研究对 23 名卒中患者通过狭窄开口时的运动模式进行了分类，识别出与年龄匹配对照组不同的卒中特定模式，主要表现为躯干旋转和支撑足调整困难。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study classified stroke-specific movement patterns when passing through narrow openings, aiding clinicians in more precise functional assessment and targeted gait and balance training.
items.limitation: 样本量较小（23 名卒中患者），且研究设计为横断面。
items.limitationEn: The sample size is small (23 stroke individuals), and the study design is cross-sectional.

items.title: PRISM-MX for Post-Stroke Spasticity: Cross-Cultural Adaptation and Preliminary Psychometric Evaluation in a Mexican Sample.
items.summary: This cross-sectional pilot study of 30 adults with post-stroke spasticity in Mexico successfully cross-culturally adapted the PRISM scale into Mexican Spanish and demonstrated its internal consistency and preliminary convergent validity.
items.curatedReason: PRISM-MX 量表在墨西哥卒中后痉挛患者中的跨文化适应性和初步心理测量学评估表明其具有内部一致性。这将为评估该人群痉挛对生活的影响提供一个患者报告结局工具。
items.titleZh: 用于卒中后痉挛的 PRISM-MX：在墨西哥样本中的跨文化适应和初步心理测量学评估。
items.summaryZh: 这项对墨西哥 30 名卒中后痉挛成人进行的横断面试点研究，成功将 PRISM 量表进行了墨西哥西班牙语的跨文化适应，并证明了其内部一致性和初步收敛效度。
items.curatedReasonEn: The cross-cultural adaptation and preliminary psychometric evaluation of the PRISM-MX scale in Mexican post-stroke spasticity patients show internal consistency, providing a patient-reported outcome measure for assessing the impact of spasticity in this population.
items.limitation: 这是一项初步的横断面试点研究，样本量小（n=30），且限于墨西哥卒中人群。
items.limitationEn: This is a preliminary cross-sectional pilot study with a small sample size (n=30), limited to a Mexican stroke population.

items.title: Early Access and Adherence to Physiotherapy in Children With Cerebral Palsy: Hospital-Based Study in Cameroon.
items.summary: A cross-sectional mixed retrospective and prospective study in Cameroon found that only 38.3% of 94 children with cerebral palsy accessed physiotherapy early (before 5 months) and showed good adherence, with socioeconomic and cultural factors influencing these rates.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究揭示了喀麦隆脑瘫儿童早期接受物理治疗和依从性的障碍。在发展中国家执业的 PT 可以参考这些社会经济和文化因素，设计更具可达性的干预方案。
items.titleZh: 喀麦隆脑瘫儿童物理治疗的早期可及性和依从性：一项基于医院的研究。
items.summaryZh: 喀麦隆一项回顾性与前瞻性混合的横断面研究发现，94 名脑瘫儿童中仅有 38.3% 早期（5 个月前）接受物理治疗并表现出良好依从性，社会经济和文化因素影响了这些比例。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study highlights barriers to early access and adherence to physiotherapy for children with cerebral palsy in Cameroon. PTs practicing in developing countries can consider these socioeconomic and cultural factors to design more accessible interventions.
items.limitation: 研究为医院回顾性数据和 caregiver 访谈的混合设计，可能存在回忆偏倚；研究结果的外推性受地理和文化背景限制。
items.limitationEn: The study's mixed retrospective design and caregiver interviews may introduce recall bias; generalizability is limited by geographical and cultural context.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: Correlates of Loneliness in Persons with Spinal Cord Injury
items.summary: This commentary highlights loneliness as a significant public health problem, exacerbated by debilitating injuries like spinal cord injury, which can limit social interactions and heighten feelings of isolation.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究探讨了脊髓损伤患者孤独感的相关因素。作为临床 PT，需要关注患者的社会心理健康，在康复方案中考虑如何促进社会参与，减轻孤独感。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤患者孤独感的相关因素。
items.summaryZh: 这篇评论文章强调孤独感是一个重大的公共卫生问题，脊髓损伤等致残性损伤会加剧孤独感，限制社交互动，加剧隔离感。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study explores correlates of loneliness in individuals with spinal cord injury. As a clinical PT, you need to address patients' psychosocial well-being and consider how to foster social engagement to mitigate loneliness in rehabilitation plans.
items.limitation: 研究设计未明确，无法评估因果关系或潜在偏倚。
items.limitationEn: The study design is not specified, preventing assessment of causality or potential biases.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Read more about Calendar Year 2027 Hospital Outpatient Prospective Payment System (OPPS) and Ambulatory Surgical Center (ASC) Proposed Rule (CMS-1850-P)
items.summary: The CMS has issued its proposed rule for the Calendar Year 2027 Hospital Outpatient Prospective Payment System (OPPS) and Ambulatory Surgical Center (ASC), which will dictate payment policies for these settings.
items.curatedReason: 这是 CMS 针对 2027 财年的门诊医院和门诊手术中心（ASC）支付系统提出的初步规则。密切关注最终规则，因为它将直接影响未来一年这些机构的物理治疗服务报销费率和政策。
items.titleZh: CMS 公布 2027 财年医院门诊支付系统（OPPS）和门诊手术中心（ASC）拟议规则
items.summaryZh: CMS 公布了 2027 财年医院门诊前瞻性支付系统（OPPS）和门诊手术中心（ASC）的拟议规则，将影响这些机构的支付政策。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is CMS's proposed rule for the Calendar Year 2027 Hospital Outpatient Prospective Payment System (OPPS) and Ambulatory Surgical Center (ASC). Pay close attention to the final rule, as it will directly impact reimbursement rates and policies for physical therapy services in these settings for the coming year.

items.title: Preoperative physiotherapy and one-year patient-reported outcomes after primary total knee arthroplasty: a registry-based cohort study of 1,688 patients.
items.summary: A registry-based cohort study of 1,688 patients undergoing primary total knee arthroplasty found no significant association between preoperative physiotherapy and improved patient-reported outcomes or pain at 2 months and 1 year postoperatively.
items.curatedReason: 队列研究显示，术前物理治疗与全膝关节置换术后 1 年患者报告结局的改善没有显著关联。这提示术前干预的价值可能不如预期，在临床实践中应审慎评估其额外投入。
items.titleZh: 术前物理治疗与初次全膝关节置换术后 1 年患者报告结局：一项基于注册数据的 1,688 例患者队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项基于注册数据的 1,688 例患者队列研究发现，接受初次全膝关节置换术的患者中，术前物理治疗与术后 2 个月和 1 年的患者报告结局或疼痛改善无显著关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cohort study indicates that preoperative physiotherapy is not significantly associated with improved 1-year patient-reported outcomes after total knee arthroplasty. This suggests the value of preoperative interventions may be less than anticipated, and its added cost should be carefully evaluated in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 本研究为队列研究，无法完全排除混杂因素对结局的影响，且研究终点为患者报告结局。
items.limitationEn: This is a cohort study, which cannot fully rule out confounding factors influencing the outcomes, and the primary endpoints are patient-reported outcomes.

items.title: Relationship Between Sarcopenia and Intensity-Specific Physical Activity in Older Adults Living in a Rural Area: An Isotemporal Substitution Analysis from the NEIGE Study.
items.summary: This study found that in community-dwelling older adults (n=527), replacing sedentary behavior with moderate-to-vigorous physical activity was associated with a lower risk of sarcopenia, using an isotemporal substitution model.
items.curatedReason: 在农村老年人群中，将久坐行为替换为中高强度身体活动与更低的肌少症风险相关。建议鼓励老年患者进行强度更高的活动，作为肌少症预防策略的重要组成部分。
items.titleZh: 农村老年人肌少症与强度特异性身体活动的关系：NEIGE 研究的等时替代分析。
items.summaryZh: 这项研究发现，在社区老年人（n=527）中，使用等时替代模型分析显示，将久坐行为替换为中高强度身体活动与较低的肌少症风险相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: Replacing sedentary behavior with moderate-to-vigorous physical activity is associated with lower sarcopenia risk in rural older adults. Encourage higher-intensity physical activity in older patients as a key component of sarcopenia prevention strategies.
items.limitation: 研究设计为横断面观察研究，无法建立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: The study design is a cross-sectional observational study, which cannot establish causality.

items.title: The Perspective and Needs of Older Adults With Osteoporosis With a Recent Upper Extremity Fragility Fracture Concerning Fall Risk and Fear of Falling.
items.summary: This qualitative study explored the perspectives of older adults with osteoporosis who had upper extremity fractures, focusing on their health concerns, the impact of falls and fear of falling (FoF) on daily life, and their views on rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 老年骨质疏松上肢脆性骨折患者对跌倒风险和跌倒恐惧的看法及需求，强调了这些心理因素在康复规划中的重要性。在制订康复方案时，请务必将其纳入考量，以促进患者的积极参与和依从性。
items.titleZh: 老年骨质疏松上肢脆性骨折患者对跌倒风险和跌倒恐惧的看法与需求。
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究探讨了骨质疏松合并上肢脆性骨折的老年患者对健康顾虑、跌倒及跌倒恐惧对日常生活的影响以及他们对康复的看法。
items.curatedReasonEn: The perspectives and needs of older adults with osteoporosis and upper extremity fragility fractures regarding fall risk and fear of falling highlight the importance of these psychological factors in rehabilitation planning. Ensure to incorporate them into rehabilitation programs to foster patient engagement and adherence.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量小，结果的普适性有限。
items.limitationEn: This qualitative study has a small sample size, limiting the generalizability of its findings.

items.title: Better immediate declarative memory is associated with forgetting during locomotor adaptation in chronic stroke and in older adults
items.summary: This study found that in individuals with chronic stroke (n=23) and age-matched controls (n=21), better immediate declarative memory was associated with greater forgetting during locomotor adaptation.
items.curatedReason: 慢性卒中患者和老年人的即时陈述性记忆能力越好，在运动适应过程中遗忘越多。这提示在神经康复中，需要关注认知功能与运动学习之间的复杂交互，特别是在制定训练策略时。
items.titleZh: 慢性卒中和老年人更好的即时陈述性记忆与步态适应过程中的遗忘相关。
items.summaryZh: 这项研究发现，在慢性卒中患者（n=23）和年龄匹配对照组（n=21）中，更好的即时陈述性记忆与步态适应过程中的更大程度遗忘相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: Better immediate declarative memory is associated with more forgetting during locomotor adaptation in chronic stroke patients and older adults. This suggests that in neurorehabilitation, the complex interplay between cognitive function and motor learning needs attention, especially when designing training strategies.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小，且为观察性研究，无法建立直接因果关系。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size and is observational, precluding the establishment of direct causality.

items.title: Establishing weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injury: a systematic review and methodological quality analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review identified weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injury, highlighting a lack of clear consensus despite high recurrence rates.
items.curatedReason: 腘绳肌损伤的重返运动标准仍缺乏共识。这份系统综述梳理了现有文献，提供了一份加权标准分析，能帮你初步评估不同标准的权重和依据，但仍需等待更高质量的研究来给出明确的 RTP 路径。
items.titleZh: 建立腘绳肌损伤后重返运动的加权标准：一项系统综述与方法学质量分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述确定了腘绳肌损伤后重返运动的加权标准，发现现有文献缺乏明确共识。
items.curatedReasonEn: Consensus on return-to-play criteria for hamstring injuries is still lacking. This systematic review provides an analysis of weighted criteria from existing literature, which can help you initially assess the evidence for different standards, but definitive RTP guidelines will require higher-quality research.
items.limitation: 纳入研究的异质性可能影响了加权标准的普遍适用性。
items.limitationEn: Heterogeneity among included studies may impact the generalizability of the weighted criteria.

items.title: Shortwave diathermy for managing knee osteoarthritis: A systematic review with meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review with meta-analysis of 17 trials (n=1,372) found that shortwave diathermy significantly improved pain (mean -2.13; 95% CI [-2.64, -1.62]; p < .01) and walking ability (mean -0.72; 95% CI [not reported]) in knee osteoarthritis.
items.curatedReason: 短波透热疗法对膝骨关节炎的疼痛和行走能力有显著改善，效应量临床相关。在你的非手术KOA管理方案中，应考虑将其作为一种有效的辅助手段。
items.titleZh: 短波透热疗法治疗膝骨关节炎：一项系统综述与Meta分析。
items.summaryZh: 一项包含17项试验（n=1,372）的系统综述与Meta分析发现，短波透热疗法显著改善了膝骨关节炎患者的疼痛（平均值 -2.13；95% CI [-2.64, -1.62]；p < .01）和行走能力（平均值 -0.72；95% CI [未报告]）。
items.curatedReasonEn: Shortwave diathermy significantly improves pain and walking ability in knee osteoarthritis, with clinically relevant effect sizes. You should consider it as an effective adjunct in your non-surgical KOA management protocols.
items.limitation: 虽然纳入了17项试验，但可能存在异质性，且未报告GRADE证据确定性。
items.limitationEn: Although 17 trials were included, heterogeneity may exist, and GRADE certainty of evidence was not reported.

items.title: Self-management in neurological disorders: a scoping review of behavior change theories, strategies, contents, and impact.
items.summary: A scoping review of 18 studies on neurological conditions (stroke, spinal cord injury, multiple sclerosis) identified and mapped behavior change theories and techniques in self-management interventions to improve functioning outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述揭示了神经疾病自我管理干预的理论和策略，为你的临床实践提供了现有证据的概览，但强调仍需更多高质量研究。
items.titleZh: 神经系统疾病中的自我管理：行为改变理论、策略、内容及影响的范围综述。
items.summaryZh: 一项涵盖18项研究（包括卒中、脊髓损伤、多发性硬化）的范围综述，识别并梳理了旨在改善神经系统疾病患者功能结果的自我管理干预中的行为改变理论和技术。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review reveals the theories and strategies behind self-management interventions for neurological disorders, offering an overview of current evidence for your clinical practice, but emphasizes the need for more high-quality research.
items.limitation: 纳入研究数量有限（18项），且涵盖的神经系统疾病类型较为广泛，可能影响其特异性。
items.limitationEn: The limited number of included studies (18) and the broad range of neurological conditions covered may affect specificity.

items.title: Read more about CMS Proposes Updates to Strengthen Medicare Program Integrity, Combat Fraud, and Expand Access to Home Health Care
items.summary: CMS proposes updates to strengthen Medicare program integrity, combat fraud, and expand access to home health care in the US.
items.curatedReason: 美国 CMS 发布了加强 Medicare 项目诚信、打击欺诈并扩大居家健康护理可及性的拟议更新。这些政策直接影响居家物理治疗服务的报销和合规要求，提醒你关注其最终规则，以调整你的运营和实践。
items.titleZh: CMS 提议更新以加强 Medicare 项目诚信、打击欺诈并扩大居家健康护理可及性
items.summaryZh: 美国医疗保险和医疗补助服务中心（CMS）提议更新其政策，旨在加强 Medicare 项目的诚信，打击欺诈，并扩大居家健康护理服务的可及性。
items.curatedReasonEn: CMS has released proposed updates to strengthen Medicare program integrity, combat fraud, and expand access to home health care in the US. These policies directly impact reimbursement and compliance requirements for home physical therapy services, urging you to monitor the final rules to adjust your operations and practice.

items.title: Decision support in the management of musculoskeletal disorders: a qualitative study of physiotherapists' and patients' experiences.
items.summary: A qualitative study based on interviews with 11 patients and 10 physiotherapists in Norway found that AI-powered clinical decision support systems influence the decision-making process by impacting decision-making authority in musculoskeletal care.
items.curatedReason: AI 辅助的临床决策支持系统（CDSS）正在进入物理治疗领域。这篇定性研究揭示了治疗师和患者在采纳 AI 推荐时的决策过程，提醒你在引入新技术时，不仅要看算法效果，还要考虑它对医患互动和决策权的影响。
items.titleZh: 肌肉骨骼疾病管理中的决策支持：物理治疗师和患者经验的定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项对挪威 11 名肌肉骨骼疾病患者和 10 名物理治疗师的访谈定性研究发现，AI 驱动的临床决策支持系统通过影响决策权力，改变了肌肉骨骼疾病管理中的决策过程。
items.curatedReasonEn: AI-assisted clinical decision support systems (CDSSs) are entering physical therapy. This qualitative study reveals how therapists and patients navigate decisions when adopting AI recommendations, reminding you that beyond algorithmic effectiveness, consider its impact on clinician-patient interaction and decision-making authority when implementing new technologies.
items.limitation: 本研究为挪威初级保健系统的定性研究，样本量小，结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study with a small sample size from the Norwegian primary healthcare system, limiting generalizability.

items.title: Read more about Calendar Year (CY) 2027 Home Health Prospective Payment System Proposed Rule Fact Sheet (CMS-1844-P)
items.summary: CMS has released a fact sheet for the Calendar Year 2027 Home Health Prospective Payment System Proposed Rule (CMS-1844-P) in the US.
items.curatedReason: CMS 2027 财年居家健康前瞻性支付系统（PPS）的拟议规则将直接影响美国居家物理治疗服务的支付方式和费率。这要求你密切关注这些潜在变化，评估其对诊所收入和运营策略的影响。
items.titleZh: 2027 日历年居家健康前瞻性支付系统拟议规则情况说明书 (CMS-1844-P)
items.summaryZh: 美国医疗保险和医疗补助服务中心（CMS）发布了 2027 日历年居家健康前瞻性支付系统拟议规则 (CMS-1844-P) 的情况说明书。
items.curatedReasonEn: CMS's proposed rule for the Calendar Year 2027 Home Health Prospective Payment System (PPS) will directly impact payment methods and rates for home physical therapy services in the US. This requires you to closely monitor these potential changes and assess their impact on your clinic's revenue and operational strategies.

items.title: Patterns of Outcome Measure Utilization in Stroke Rehabilitation Lower Extremity Trials Conducted in Low-to-Middle versus High-Income Countries.
items.summary: A systematic review of 1,548 RCTs found that low-to-middle income countries utilized more generalized impairment and activities of daily living outcome measures in stroke rehabilitation lower extremity trials compared to high-income countries, often relying on patient observation.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究揭示了中低收入国家与高收入国家在卒中康复下肢运动试验中结局指标选择的显著差异。你在跨文化背景下评估研究或设计试验时，需要警惕这种测量偏倚，这会影响结果的可比性和普适性。
items.titleZh: 中低收入国家与高收入国家在卒中康复下肢试验中结局指标利用模式的比较。
items.summaryZh: 一项对1548项RCT的系统综述发现，中低收入国家在卒中康复下肢运动试验中，与高收入国家相比，更多地使用依赖患者观察的、更通用的功能障碍和日常生活活动结局指标。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study reveals significant differences in outcome measure selection in stroke rehabilitation lower extremity trials between low-to-middle income and high-income countries. When evaluating research or designing trials in cross-cultural contexts, be aware of this measurement bias, which affects comparability and generalizability of results.
items.limitation: 本系统综述的局限性在于其依赖于已发表研究的数据，可能受限于原始研究报告的质量和完整性。
items.limitationEn: The limitation of this systematic review is its reliance on data from published studies, which may be constrained by the quality and completeness of original study reports.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: The use of focus of attention for instruction and feedback during telehealth physiotherapy: An observational study.
items.summary: An exploratory observational study examined how six pediatric physiotherapists used focus of attention for instruction and feedback during telehealth for clients with neurodevelopmental disorders, involving 12 client-physiotherapist dyads.
items.curatedReason: 这项探索性观察研究首次直接评估了儿科物理治疗师在远程医疗中运用注意力焦点的情况。了解注意力焦点在远程治疗中的应用有助于你优化远程指导和反馈策略，尤其是在资源受限的环境中。
items.titleZh: 远程物理治疗中运用注意力焦点进行指导和反馈：一项观察性研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项探索性观察研究考察了六名儿科物理治疗师在通过远程医疗对神经发育障碍患者进行指导和反馈时如何使用注意力焦点，共涉及12对患者-治疗师。
items.curatedReasonEn: This exploratory observational study is the first to directly assess pediatric physiotherapists' use of focus of attention in telehealth. Understanding how focus of attention is applied in remote therapy can help you optimize telehealth instruction and feedback strategies, especially in resource-limited settings.
items.limitation: 本研究为小样本观察性设计，结果的外推性有限，且不能确定因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This study is a small-sample observational design with limited generalizability and cannot establish causality.

items.title: Short-term effects of therapeutic massage alone or combined with conventional physiotherapy in myofascial pain syndrome: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (n=60) found that therapeutic massage alone or combined with conventional physiotherapy may provide superior short-term effects on pain, pressure pain threshold, muscle activity, functional disability, and quality of life in individuals with chronic upper trapezius myofascial pain syndrome compared to conventional physiotherapy alone.
items.curatedReason: 对于肌筋膜疼痛综合征，治疗性按摩单独使用或与传统理疗结合，短期效果可能均优于单纯传统理疗，在疼痛缓解和功能改善上有积极作用。
items.titleZh: 治疗性按摩单独或联合传统理疗对肌筋膜疼痛综合征的短期疗效：一项随机对照试验。
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（n=60）发现，对于慢性斜方肌上部肌筋膜疼痛综合征患者，治疗性按摩单独使用或与传统理疗结合，在疼痛、压痛阈、肌肉活动、功能障碍和生活质量方面，短期效果可能优于单纯传统理疗。
items.curatedReasonEn: For myofascial pain syndrome, therapeutic massage, either alone or combined with conventional physiotherapy, may offer superior short-term effects in pain relief and functional improvement compared to conventional physiotherapy alone.
items.limitation: 本研究的样本量为60人，研究设计为单中心RCT，可能存在局限性且随访期较短。
items.limitationEn: This study has a sample size of 60 participants and is a single-center RCT, which may limit generalizability and has a short follow-up period.

items.title: Online group exercise for people with Parkinson's disease: rehabilitation and fitness professionals' experiences to inform physiotherapy practice and service delivery - a qualitative interview study.
items.summary: A qualitative interview study explored the experiences of 10 rehabilitation and fitness professionals delivering online group exercise for people with Parkinson's disease (PwP), informing physiotherapy practice and service delivery.
items.curatedReason: 在线团体运动已显示出对帕金森病患者的可行性和益处。作为临床医生，你可以借鉴这篇定性研究中专业人士的经验，优化你的在线康复服务，以更好地满足帕金森病患者的需求。
items.titleZh: 帕金森病患者的在线团体运动：康复和健身专业人员的经验以指导物理治疗实践和服务提供——一项定性访谈研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项定性访谈研究探讨了10名康复和健身专业人员为帕金森病患者提供在线团体运动的经验，为物理治疗实践和服务提供提供信息。
items.curatedReasonEn: Online group exercise has shown feasibility and benefits for people with Parkinson's disease. As a clinician, you can draw from the experiences of professionals in this qualitative study to optimize your online rehabilitation services and better meet the needs of PwP.
items.limitation: 作为定性研究，其结果不具有普遍性，受访者仅为10名专业人员。
items.limitationEn: As a qualitative study, its findings are not generalizable, and it only included 10 professionals.

items.title: July 1, 2026 How Smarter Workflows Strengthen the Entire Revenue Cycle
items.summary: WebPT published a blog post discussing how smarter workflows can strengthen the entire revenue cycle for physical therapy practices.
items.curatedReason: WebPT 的这篇博客讨论了如何通过更智能的工作流程来加强营收周期。在优化诊所运营和财务管理时，你可以从中获取一些启发，提升效率。
items.titleZh: 2026年7月1日：更智能的工作流程如何强化整个营收周期。
items.summaryZh: WebPT发布了一篇博文，讨论了更智能的工作流程如何加强物理治疗实践的整个营收周期。
items.curatedReasonEn: This WebPT blog discusses strengthening the revenue cycle through smarter workflows. You can gain insights from it to optimize clinic operations and financial management, improving efficiency.

items.title: Promoting Client-Centered Communication in Rehabilitation: Strategies for Managing Difficult Conversations
items.summary: This article discusses strategies for promoting client-centered communication in rehabilitation, emphasizing its importance for managing difficult conversations and improving client-clinician relationships and outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 康复治疗中，掌握以客户为中心的沟通策略对于管理复杂对话和情境至关重要。这有助于你维护医患关系，并优化治疗结局。
items.titleZh: 在康复治疗中促进以客户为中心的沟通：管理困难对话的策略
items.summaryZh: 本文探讨了在康复治疗中促进以客户为中心的沟通策略，强调其在管理困难对话、改善医患关系和治疗结局方面的重要性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Mastering client-centered communication strategies is crucial in rehabilitation for managing complex conversations and situations. This will help you maintain client-clinician relationships and optimize treatment outcomes.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Anti-Compensatory Saccades Changes After Visuo-Vestibular Physical Therapy in People With Acute Unilateral Vestibulopathy: A Prospective Observational Study.
items.summary: In 92 patients with acute unilateral vestibulopathy, an 8-week visuo-vestibular physical therapy program improved anti-compensatory saccades, which reflect vestibulo-saccadic interaction.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性观察研究提示，对于急性单侧前庭病患者，视-前庭物理治疗可以改善抗代偿性眼跳。将 SHIMP 评估的抗代偿性眼跳作为中枢代偿的标志物，能帮你更客观地追踪和优化神经康复方案。
items.titleZh: 急性单侧前庭病患者视-前庭物理治疗后抗代偿性眼跳的变化：一项前瞻性观察研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性观察研究显示，92名急性单侧前庭病患者在接受为期8周的视-前庭物理治疗后，其抗代偿性眼跳（反映前庭-眼跳相互作用）有所改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective observational study suggests that visuo-vestibular physical therapy can improve anti-compensatory saccades in patients with acute unilateral vestibulopathy. Utilizing anti-compensatory saccades, as assessed by SHIMP, as a marker of central compensation can help you objectively track and optimize neurorehabilitation protocols.
items.limitation: 本研究为单中心观察性研究，且未设对照组，可能存在混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This was a single-center observational study without a control group, which may introduce confounding factors.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Developing a patient decision aid for Femoroacetabular Impingement Syndrome: A mixed-methods study.
items.summary: A mixed-methods study developed and user-tested a patient decision aid for Femoroacetabular Impingement Syndrome (FAIS), comparing non-surgical management and hip arthroscopy, with feedback gathered through iterative semi-structured interviews.
items.curatedReason: 开发患者决策辅助工具是改善医患共享决策的重要一步，尤其对于 FAIS 这种保守治疗与手术选择并存的病症。但这项研究尚处于工具开发和用户测试阶段，离临床应用还有距离。
items.titleZh: 股骨髋臼撞击综合征患者决策辅助工具的开发：一项混合方法学研究
items.summaryZh: 一项混合方法学研究开发并用户测试了股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAIS）的患者决策辅助工具，旨在比较非手术治疗与髋关节镜手术，并通过迭代半结构化访谈收集反馈。
items.curatedReasonEn: Developing patient decision aids is a crucial step towards improving shared decision-making, particularly for conditions like FAIS where both conservative and surgical options exist. However, this study is still in the tool development and user-testing phase, and not yet ready for clinical application.
items.limitation: 本研究为混合方法学设计，旨在开发和用户测试决策辅助工具，尚未评估其临床有效性和结局。
items.limitationEn: This mixed-methods study focused on developing and user-testing a decision aid, without evaluating its clinical effectiveness or outcomes.

items.title: Inter-rater reliability and construct validity of a cross-diagnostic movement quality score for rehabilitation assessment.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study involving 84 hospitalized patients across diagnostic groups found good inter-rater reliability for the Movement Quality Score (MQS) (ICC [2,1] = 0.81) and moderate construct validity with FIM scores (ρ = 0.52–0.70).
items.curatedReason: 运动质量评分（MQS）是康复评估工具箱的一个补充。其在不同诊断组间的评分者间信度良好（ICC [2,1] = 0.81），并与 FIM 评分有中度相关性（ρ = 0.52–0.70），提示其在多学科康复中的潜在应用价值。
items.titleZh: 康复评估中跨诊断运动质量评分的评分者间信度与结构效度
items.summaryZh: 一项对 84 名住院患者进行的横断面研究发现，运动质量评分（MQS）在神经、肌肉骨骼和内科诊断组中显示出良好的评分者间信度（ICC [2,1] = 0.81）和与功能独立性评定量表（FIM）的中度结构效度（ρ = 0.52–0.70）。
items.curatedReasonEn: The Movement Quality Score (MQS) is a useful addition to your rehabilitation assessment toolkit. Its good inter-rater reliability (ICC [2,1] = 0.81) and moderate correlation with FIM scores (ρ = 0.52–0.70) across different diagnostic groups suggest its potential utility in multidisciplinary rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面设计，且样本量为 84 名住院患者，评估了评分者间信度和结构效度，但未评估 MQS 预测临床结局或指导治疗的长期有效性。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional study, with 84 hospitalized patients, assessed inter-rater reliability and construct validity, but did not evaluate the long-term effectiveness of MQS in predicting clinical outcomes or guiding treatment.

items.title: Prioritising fall prevention strategies in Parkinson's disease: A multi-method evaluation.
items.summary: A multi-method study integrating a structured narrative review, Delphi process, and Best-Worst Method quantitatively prioritized fall prevention strategies for Parkinson's disease.
items.curatedReason: 这份研究结合了专家共识和多标准决策分析，为帕金森病患者的跌倒预防策略提供了量化优先顺序。在制定或修订临床路径时，这是筛选干预方案的重要参考。
items.titleZh: 帕金森病跌倒预防策略的优先顺序：一项多方法评估。
items.summaryZh: 一项结合了结构性综述、Delphi专家共识和最佳-最差方法的多方法研究，量化了帕金森病跌倒预防策略的优先顺序。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study, integrating expert consensus and multi-criteria decision-making, offers a quantified prioritization of fall prevention strategies for Parkinson's disease. This is a critical reference when developing or revising clinical pathways to select interventions.
items.limitation: 专家共识和决策分析的性质决定了其结论可能受专家组成和初始信息的影响。
items.limitationEn: The nature of expert consensus and decision-making analysis means conclusions may be influenced by expert panel composition and initial information.

items.title: Efficacy of an Intensive Community-Based Next-Generation NeuroAnimation Therapy in Reducing Upper Extremity Impairment after Stroke: Small Retrospective Cohort Study
items.summary: A small retrospective cohort study found that an intensive community-based Next-Generation NeuroAnimation Therapy (NG-NAT) was effective in reducing upper extremity impairment after stroke.
items.curatedReason: 社区环境下的高剂量、高强度虚拟现实（VR）神经动画疗法，提示对卒中后上肢功能障碍有改善作用。对于传统康复资源有限的社区患者，这可能是个值得关注的替代方案。
items.titleZh: 一项社区高强度下一代神经动画疗法在减少卒中后上肢功能障碍方面的疗效：小型回顾性队列研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项小型回顾性队列研究发现，社区密集型下一代神经动画疗法（NG-NAT）能有效减轻卒中后的上肢功能障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: High-dose, high-intensity virtual reality (VR) neuroanimation therapy in a community setting suggests improvements in post-stroke upper extremity impairment. For community patients with limited traditional rehabilitation resources, this could be a promising alternative worth monitoring.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性队列研究，且样本量较小，可能存在选择偏倚和混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective cohort study with a small sample size, which may be subject to selection bias and confounding factors.

items.title: Immediate and Sustained Effects of Contralateral Handgrip Exercise on Hand Edema in Patients with Stroke.
items.summary: Contralateral resistance handgrip exercises performed with the non-paretic hand demonstrated immediate and sustainable reductions in hand edema in patients with stroke.
items.curatedReason: 卒中后手部水肿是个棘手问题。健侧手握力练习作为一种简单易行的干预手段，提示有即时和持续性减水肿效果。可考虑将其纳入常规辅助康复方案。
items.titleZh: 对侧手握力练习对卒中患者手部水肿的即时和持续效果。
items.summaryZh: 对卒中患者进行健侧手握力练习，可立即并持续减少手部水肿。
items.curatedReasonEn: Post-stroke hand edema is challenging. Contralateral handgrip exercise, as a simple and feasible intervention, shows immediate and sustained edema reduction. Consider integrating it as an adjunctive therapy in routine rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 本研究为单病例B-A-B设计，样本量有限，结果外推性需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: This study used a single-case B-A-B design with a limited sample size, so generalizability of results should be approached with caution.

items.title: Transitional care interventions and outcome measures in stroke rehabilitation: a scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review described the intervention components and outcomes of transitional care interventions in stroke rehabilitation, identifying 4,663 abstracts and reviewing full text of articles.
items.curatedReason: 本范围综述系统梳理了卒中康复中过渡期护理干预的组成和结局指标。这为优化不同护理阶段间的衔接提供了循证参考，尤其是在制定跨机构康复方案时。
items.titleZh: 卒中康复中的过渡期护理干预及结局指标：一项范围综述。
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述描述了卒中康复中过渡期护理干预的组成部分和结局指标，共筛选了4,663篇摘要并审查了全文。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review systematically outlines the components and outcome measures of transitional care interventions in stroke rehabilitation. This provides an evidence-based reference for optimizing care transitions, especially when developing cross-institutional rehabilitation programs.
items.limitation: 本研究为范围综述，侧重于描述性总结而非效应量评估，不能直接提供干预的疗效等级。
items.limitationEn: As a scoping review, this study focuses on descriptive summaries rather than effect size evaluation, and cannot directly provide intervention efficacy grades.

items.title: Smallest worthwhile effect of anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction compared with non-surgical management: a benefit-harm trade-off study.
items.summary: A benefit-harm trade-off study quantified the smallest worthwhile effect of ACL reconstruction versus non-surgical management, as perceived by 92 recreational or competitive athletes, for improving knee function and return to sport.
items.curatedReason: 关于 ACL 重建与非手术管理之间的权衡，这项研究量化了患者认为值得进行手术的最小效果量。这能为你与患者共同决策时提供一个基于患者视角的关键指标，尤其是在运动功能和重返运动方面。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建与非手术治疗的最小价值效应：一项益害权衡研究
items.summaryZh: 一项益害权衡研究调查了 92 名参与休闲或竞技体育的个体，估算了前交叉韧带（ACL）重建相较于非手术管理，在改善膝关节功能和重返运动方面，患者认为值得达到的最小效果量。
items.curatedReasonEn: Regarding the trade-off between ACL reconstruction and non-surgical management, this study quantifies the smallest worthwhile effect for surgery as perceived by patients. This provides a crucial patient-centered metric for shared decision-making, especially concerning knee function and return to sport.
items.limitation: 研究通过在线调查进行，结果可能存在选择偏倚，且未能反映真实临床场景下的复杂决策因素。
items.limitationEn: The study was conducted via an online survey, which may introduce selection bias, and does not reflect the complex decision-making factors in real clinical scenarios.

items.title: Associations of neuropathic pain and pain catastrophizing with rehabilitation outcomes in patients with stroke.
items.summary: This prospective observational study found that neuropathic pain and pain catastrophizing are common after stroke and are associated with poorer rehabilitation outcomes, impacting functional status and quality of life after a 4-week rehabilitation program.
items.curatedReason: 卒中后神经病理性疼痛和灾难化思维对康复结局的负面关联值得你高度关注。早期筛查并干预这些因素，有助于优化卒中患者的康复路径和长期功能恢复。
items.titleZh: 神经病理性疼痛和疼痛灾难化思维与卒中患者康复结局的关联
items.summaryZh: 这项前瞻性观察研究发现，卒中后神经病理性疼痛和疼痛灾难化思维很常见，并与较差的康复结局相关，影响了为期 4 周康复计划后的功能状态和生活质量。
items.curatedReasonEn: The negative association of neuropathic pain and pain catastrophizing with stroke rehabilitation outcomes warrants your close attention. Early screening and intervention for these factors can optimize rehabilitation pathways and long-term functional recovery for stroke patients.
items.limitation: 研究样本为接受住院康复的卒中偏瘫患者，结果外推至其他卒中人群时需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study's sample consists of inpatient rehabilitation patients with post-stroke hemiplegia, so results should be cautiously generalized to other stroke populations.

items.title: Early rehabilitation in trauma patients: an observational study from two Norwegian trauma centers.
items.summary: An observational cohort study in Norway found that only 10% of severely injured trauma patients received assessment by a physical and rehabilitation medicine specialist within 72 hours, with early assessment occurring in 43% of patients with spinal cord injuries.
items.curatedReason: 挪威创伤中心的数据提示，重伤患者早期获得物理和康复医学专科医生咨询的比例较低。这提醒你思考所在机构早期康复评估和干预流程的优化空间，确保高风险患者的康复需求不被延误。
items.titleZh: 挪威两家创伤中心对创伤患者早期康复的观察性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项在挪威进行的观察性队列研究发现，仅有 10% 的重伤创伤患者在 72 小时内接受了物理和康复医学专家的评估，其中 43% 的脊髓损伤患者获得了早期评估。
items.curatedReasonEn: Data from Norwegian trauma centers indicate a low proportion of severely injured patients receiving early consultation from physical and rehabilitation medicine specialists. This prompts you to consider optimizing early rehabilitation assessment and intervention processes in your own institution to ensure high-risk patients' rehabilitation needs are not delayed.
items.limitation: 本研究为挪威两个创伤中心的观察性队列研究，结果在不同医疗系统和患者群体中可能存在差异。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational cohort study from two Norwegian trauma centers, and results may vary across different healthcare systems and patient populations.

items.title: Recent highlights in motor recovery and rehabilitation research after stroke.
items.summary: A systematic review identified 118 RCTs, protocols, and systematic reviews with meta-analyses since 2020, highlighting recent advances in motor recovery and rehabilitation research after stroke and providing recommendations for future trials.
items.curatedReason: 这份系统性综述总结了卒中后运动功能恢复和康复研究的最新进展，将帮助你快速了解和评估当前最有前景的干预策略，并为未来研究方向提供依据。
items.titleZh: 卒中后运动功能恢复和康复研究的最新亮点。
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述自2020年起共识别出118项随机对照试验、试验方案及系统综述和荟萃分析，总结了卒中后运动功能恢复和康复研究的最新进展，并为未来试验提出了建议。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review summarizes recent advances in motor recovery and rehabilitation research post-stroke, helping you quickly grasp and evaluate the most promising intervention strategies and inform future research directions.
items.limitation: 本综述仅纳入样本量≥100的RCTs、RCTs方案和系统综述，可能遗漏了有价值的小样本研究。
items.limitationEn: This review only included RCTs with n≥100 participants, RCT protocols, and systematic reviews, potentially omitting valuable smaller-scale studies.

items.title: Multi-Domain Benefits of Exergaming for Sarcopenia Management in Institutionalized Older Adults: Physical, Psychological, and Social Outcomes
items.summary: Exergaming offers multi-domain benefits for sarcopenia management in institutionalized older adults, encompassing physical, psychological, and social outcomes, aligning with a biopsychosocial understanding of the condition.
items.curatedReason: 本研究揭示了老年人肌少症管理中体感游戏的多元益处，不仅限于身体层面，还包括心理和社会结局。这意味着你在为机构养老的老年患者设计肌少症干预方案时，可以考虑整合体感游戏，以期获得更全面的效果。
items.titleZh: 体感游戏在机构养老老年人肌少症管理中的多领域益处：身体、心理和社会结局
items.summaryZh: 体感游戏在机构养老老年人的肌少症管理中展现出多领域益处，包括身体、心理和社会结局，这与肌少症的生物心理社会模型相符。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study highlights the multi-domain benefits of exergaming for sarcopenia management in institutionalized older adults, extending beyond physical to psychological and social outcomes. This means you can consider integrating exergaming when designing sarcopenia interventions for older adults in long-term care, aiming for more comprehensive effects.
items.limitation: 该研究关注机构养老的老年人群，其结果对外推至社区居住老年人时需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study focuses on institutionalized older adults, so its findings require caution when extrapolating to community-dwelling seniors.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

related.title: Multi-Domain Benefits of Exergaming for Sarcopenia Management in Institutionalized Older Adults: Physical, Psychological, and Social Outcomes.

items.title: The WalkBack (walking and education) program for prevention of low back pain is acceptable to physiotherapists but relies on training, flexibility and system-level enablers to optimise implementation: a qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study found that physiotherapists perceive the WalkBack (walking and education) program for low back pain prevention as acceptable, but successful implementation depends on training, flexibility, and system-level enablers.
items.curatedReason: WalkBack 项目（预防复发性腰痛的步行和教育干预）在澳洲 PT 临床的可接受性较高，但其全面实施依赖于充足的培训、临床灵活性和系统层面的支持。
items.titleZh: WalkBack（步行与教育）项目预防腰痛对物理治疗师而言可接受，但其最佳实施有赖于培训、灵活性和系统层面的支持：一项定性研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究发现，物理治疗师普遍认为用于预防腰痛的 WalkBack 步行和教育项目是可接受的，但其成功实施需要充分的培训、临床操作灵活性以及系统层面的支持。
items.curatedReasonEn: The WalkBack program (walking and education intervention for recurrent low back pain prevention) is highly acceptable to Australian PTs in clinical practice, but its full implementation hinges on adequate training, clinical flexibility, and system-level support.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量有限（20名），结果外推性受限。
items.limitationEn: This qualitative study has a limited sample size (20 physiotherapists), which restricts the generalizability of its findings.

items.title: Exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation is safe but not superior to a single session of physiotherapy for improving quality of life: a randomised trial.
items.summary: An assessor-blinded pragmatic RCT found that an 8-week group exercise-based telerehabilitation program was safe but not superior to a single in-person physiotherapy session for improving health-related quality of life in cancer survivors.
items.curatedReason: 远程运动癌症康复是安全的，但在改善生活质量方面，并不优于单次物理治疗评估和建议。这提示远程模式可能更适合作为常规门诊的补充，而非完全替代，尤其是在生活质量这一核心结局上。
items.titleZh: 远程运动癌症康复是安全的，但对改善生活质量并不优于单次物理治疗：一项随机试验。
items.summaryZh: 一项评估者设盲的实用性随机对照试验显示，为期8周的团体运动型远程癌症康复项目是安全的，但在改善癌症幸存者健康相关生活质量方面，并不优于单次现场物理治疗评估和建议。
items.curatedReasonEn: Exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation is safe but not superior to a single session of physiotherapy for improving quality of life. This suggests telerehabilitation might be better as a supplement to, rather than a full replacement for, in-person outpatient care, especially concerning quality of life outcomes.
items.limitation: 研究未详细说明单次物理治疗的具体干预内容，可能影响对照组的干预强度。
items.limitationEn: The study did not detail the specific intervention content of the single physiotherapy session, which might affect the intensity of the control group's intervention.
